amendments.text: [(a) This Part prescribes airworthiness standards for the issue of type certificates, and changes to those certificates, for airplanes in the normal, utility, acrobatic and commuter categories.] (b) Each person who applies under Part 21 for such a certificate or change must show compliance with the applicable requirements of this Part. 83-17; Issued on 09/23/83. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 83-17; Issued on 09/23/83. 23516; Issued on 01/08/87. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 23516; Issued on 01/08/87.
